name: Cabbage Patch Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ground beef in Dutch oven, stirring occasionally, until brown; drain.
2. Stir in cabbage, celery, and onions. Cook stirring occasionally, until vegetables are light brown.
3. Stir in remaining ingredients. Heat to boiling; reduce heat.
4. While beef mixture is simmering, prepare Cheese Dumplings (see recipe).
5. Drop dumpling dough by 10 to 12 spoonfuls onto hot beef mixture (do not drop directly into liquid).
6. Cook uncovered for 10 minutes.
7. Cover and cook for an additional 10 minutes longer.
